title: DC-Test
description: A modpack I created for my friend group. Consists of some client and server optimisation mods, NEI & minimap
body:
Hi! This modpack is one I put together for my friends.

It currently features some optimisation, NEI & a minimap. I plan to add some more mods in the future, the mods I plan to add will be under a few umbrellas. I'll be adding some storage mods, exploration, automation, Quality of life, magic, proximity voice chat, etc.

If you want to try a modpack that features some mods that you haven't used before then I implore you to give it a try.

Currently the modpack is in a playable state, but I do plan on adding more soon.
